title: SWORD Strikes Pirate Island
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Shanks, Kizaru, Unknown person #13, Marines, Garp as Garp storms Hachinosu to rescue Koby, bringing SWORD, Blackbeard’s commanders, and pirate island chaos into direct conflict.
scene: Garp storms Hachinosu to rescue Koby, bringing SWORD, Blackbeard’s commanders, and pirate island chaos into direct conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: You're kidding... it's the legendary hero...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I don't believe what I'm seein'!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that a navy battleship flying up there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Wait, is someone standing on it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is no time for questions, let's book it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Crap! There's too many of us packed in here! We're trapped!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BWA ha ha ha ha ha ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Screw running, nowhere on the island is safe! We need to set sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no use! There's no way out of the center now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should've thought twice before you kidnapped KOBY!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: He's the future of the Marines!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would you go this far for me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He's also my irre- placeable protege!!

summary: This part advances the Hachinosu Rescue through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
